title: Windows Account or Group Enumeration Spike
description: Detects repeated Security Event IDs 4798 and 4799, which can indicate adversary account or group membership enumeration.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Security Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Event Security Logs') and 'Event ID' in ('4798', '4799') | stats count as EnumerationEvents, unique('Target User Name') as Targets by User, 'Source Address', 'Host Name (Server)' | where EnumerationEvents > 3 | sort -EnumerationEvents

references.name: Microsoft Learn: 4798(S) A user's local group membership was enumerated
Microsoft Learn: 4799(S) A security-enabled local group membership was enumerated
